scripts.build: bun run --filter '@vasp-framework/core' build && bun run --filter '@vasp-framework/parser' build && bun run --filter '@vasp-framework/generator' build && bun run --filter '@vasp-framework/runtime' build && bun run --filter 'vasp-cli' build
scripts.publish:all: bun run build && cd packages/core && npm publish --access public && cd ../parser && npm publish --access public && cd ../generator && npm publish --access public && cd ../runtime && npm publish --access public && cd ../cli && npm publish
